summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AVAIRA decentralized AI execution control protocol. Backend APIs 89.5% success rate, frontend fully functional after fixing Cell import issue in Reputation component.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 400 when agent is already frozen
Returns 500 due to MongoDB integer overflow in EIP-712 permit nonce generation
flaky_endpoints.impact: Lifecycle simulation fails, prevents demo functionality

integration_issues.issue: Simulation fails due to backend 500 error but UI handles gracefully

fixed_issues.issue: Missing Cell import from recharts causing navigation crash

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/executions/request - deviation detection and agent freezing
Frontend: Dashboard page loads with stats cards and activity feed
Frontend: Navigation sidebar - all 7 pages accessible
Frontend: Agent Registry page loads with existing agents and register dialog
Frontend: Dashboard stats display with distribution charts and treasury split

medium_priority: Fix MongoDB integer overflow in simulate/lifecycle endpoint by using smaller nonce values or string-based nonces
Improve freeze agent endpoint to return proper error message when agent already frozen
low_priority: Add error handling for edge cases in freeze functionality
